title: Notification No.116/2017-Cus(NT), dated 26.08.2016
text: [To be published in Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance Department of Revenue Notification No. 116/2016 -Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, dated the 26th August, 2016 S.O. (E).- In compliance with the directions of Hon’ble CESTAT’s Final Order No. 41672-41675/2015 dated 11.11.2015, remanding the matter for de novo proceedings, passed in 4 appeals as stated in column (4) and (5) of the Table below, pertaining to noticee mentioned in column (2) of the said Table, and in exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Commissioner of Customs, Chennai-II, Custom House, Chennai to act as a Common Adjudicating Authority to exercise powers and discharge duties conferred or imposed on officers mentioned in column (3) of the Table in respect of the Order-in-Original mentioned in column (3) of the Table, for purpose of adjudication, namely:- Table Sl. No. Name of the Noticee and Address Order-in-Original Number and dated and the officer who had passed the Adjudication Order Appeal Number before the Hon’ble CESTAT, Chennai Appeal filed by (1) (2) (3) (4) (5) 1. M/s Nagarjuna Oil Corporation Limited, Chennai 75/11-12 dated 19.01.2012 of Assistant Commissioner of Customs, Nagapattinam C/323/2012 Noticee 15051/11 dated 04.03.2011 of Deputy Commissioner of Customs, Custom House, Chennai C/324/2012 Noticee 10/11 dated 29.11.2011 of Assistant Commissioner of Customs,Cuddalore C/141/2012 Revenue 2/12 dated 09.03.2012 of Assistant Commissioner of Customs, Cuddalore C/40701/15 Noticee F. No.437/07/2016-Cus-IV] Z. R. Kamili) Director (Customs) -- 1 of 1 --
